supplies covered as DME, are paid separately from the 
HH PPS and are excluded from the consolidated billing requirements 
governing the HH PPS. The determining factor is the medical 
classification of the supply, not the diagnosis of the 
patient. 

Certain injectable osteoporosis drugs are included in consolidated billing 
under the home health benefit. However, payment is not bundled into the 
HH PPS payment rates. HHAs must bill for the osteoporosis drug in 
accordance with billing
